Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 84ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
35ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 33ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Scenario:
Validation fails when platform username is empty
14ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 13ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should fail validation < 1ms

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 12ms
field value

currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 404,
          "body": {
            "error": {
              "platform_username": "invalid_username"
            },
            "message": "User not found",
            "code": 404,
            "message_code": 14008
          }
        }

          }
        }

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid
11ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 11ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:

          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update 26ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates
So that the merchant can receive wager update events for supported wallet modes

Scenario:
Notify merchant with a single wager update
10ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 10ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": (wager_type.normal_wager),
      "status": (wager_status.settled),
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    }
  ]
}
 Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:8082/wager/notify
    Payload:
        {
          "notification_type": "typeA",
          "notifications": [
            {
              "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
              "game_key": "PT_SLOT",
              "wager_no": "wager-1774000182498-iuocc8",
              "origin_wager_no": null,
              "ticket_no": "ticket-71cf6d03-1187-4397-ab83-501c549da178",
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "type": 1,
              "status": 2,
              "currency": "CNY",
              "amount": 10.1,
              "payment_amount": 10.1,
              "effective_amount": 10,
              "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
              "wager_time": 1774000182,
              "settlement_time": 1774000182,
              "is_system_reward": false
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": null,
            "message": "Mock success case"
          }
        }

Info

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 7ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": "(origin_wager_no)",
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.resettled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    },
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_seamless)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_seamless)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": null,
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.settled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 5.1,
      "payment_amount": 5.1,
      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false
    }
  ]
}

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 234ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
90ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 18ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

And I prepare a valid amount less than the balance by 10 < 1ms Show Info + 
Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

Info 

Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

When APISYS requests payment with: 34ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount -<deduction_amount>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "d62458db-f859-4fcf-a41e-af87b4935eb9",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.125"

        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "7d60f04d-90bd-4f17-be1d-032fa192495e",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "b8463fbc-5383-447e-8edb-9275e4ad84e5",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

          "transaction_no": "a56b0f50-ed0d-42e2-995e-05a78c6e14b1",
          "currency": "CNY",

        }

        {
          "status": 400,

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 286ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet balance
60ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {

              "balances": {

            },

          }
        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 31ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "a15339e5-9c46-44b2-9e33-ff1c4918cdf8",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000182793-a8wndi",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1774000182",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "bf36fd00-6cf4-473d-9e3c-c53076726947",
            "origin_order_no": "0eae0f7c-c035-44e8-a7aa-c95e86fde7c8",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "c5644545-3b72-40ab-9082-16ca1aff1ac0"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "735e38cb-4d02-4f06-876f-56e85a641c3b"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          }

Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        10
    After:
        35.75
    Expected increase:
        25.75
    Expected:
        35.75

          ]

          "status": 200,

When APISYS settles a wager with: 35ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 10
effective_amount 10
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": 2.5, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": 1, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "7271e075-14a1-4478-864d-6311a746914f",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000182855-3v890o",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10",
          "effective_amount": "10",
          "settlement_time": "1774000182",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "9c1d092a-a0a8-43c9-8985-79592e4e7b25",
            "origin_order_no": "46571ed9-93ab-4eb4-a48d-c05205784ac2",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "0f7c01bb-3077-477b-9f89-bc6db476f4cd"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "a7504d99-553d-4ad4-b069-3a23c04531c9",
              "amount": 2.5,
              "settlement_time": 1774000182
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "815d9171-c946-4b39-a792-e7345cd29ee8",
              "amount": 1,
              "settlement_time": 1774000182
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "809e1a23-eebb-4ad5-aecf-eae084b1c7e8"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

field value
reference_id any non-empty value

          }
        }

Setup:

When APISYS settles a wager with: 10ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "d0b0a9c0-007b-4e3c-8b6b-a6263d827df3",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000183075-39ywf4",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1774000183",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "a93b476c-2f76-4288-8f16-f895621ad26e",
            "origin_order_no": "6cd8563d-c40e-4d55-ae97-647b619cf245",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "49d06857-732a-4006-bcc6-8b77230891be"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "d0b0a9c0-007b-4e3c-8b6b-a6263d827df3",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000183075-39ywf4",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1774000183",

            "origin_sub_order_no": "49d06857-732a-4006-bcc6-8b77230891be"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",

          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO007 response should fail validation < 1ms

Feature:AMO008 Seamless Cancel Wager 14ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

Scenario:
Cancel wager refunds a prepared paid wager
14ms 2 3 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

    Payload:

        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 64.25

            },

        }

And a prepared paid wager fixture exists for: < 1ms
field value
wager_no <wager_no>
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^a prepared paid wager fixture exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO008 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO008 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 72.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        72.5

< 1ms 13

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the member wallet has balances: < 1ms
currency balance
<currency> 100 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Given a bet exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no> 

Then(/^a bet exists with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS requests payment with: < 1ms
transaction_no
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -30

Then the response should be successful < 1ms

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And a request payment transaction exists with: < 1ms
wager_no
order_no <transaction_uuid_1>
currency <currency>
amount -30

  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the request payment transaction payload includes wager: < 1ms
wager_no
payment_amount 30

Feature:AMO010 Request Transfer In 391ms 8 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer in API
So that I can credit funds into the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer in increases wallet balance
71ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 72.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        72.5

transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>

currency <currency>
amount 75.125
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f1c06e07-c6b1-4672-b2c7-a95b244db5a6",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "75.125",
          "session_id": "e839052d-724c-4f87-a6f5-1f3d2f90df50"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "e8939ee2-d697-4ad2-b67a-6973a9039f6f",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

          "currencies": [
            "CNY"

        }

game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 0
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "2fecd916-6ea4-432c-a21c-49b774f3172b",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "0",
          "session_id": "5dab3a99-9e00-4c90-9718-27c549949333"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b1a1ecdf-f4e0-4840-b798-1abfc66ff5e7",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "2fecd916-6ea4-432c-a21c-49b774f3172b",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "0",
          "session_id": "5dab3a99-9e00-4c90-9718-27c549949333"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b1a1ecdf-f4e0-4840-b798-1abfc66ff5e7",
              "status": 1

            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged 15ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check (unchanged):
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        197.625
    After:
        197.625
    Expected:
        197.625

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check (unchanged):
    Currency:
        CNY

        197.625
    After:
        197.625
    Expected:
        197.625

Scenario:
Validation fails when amount precision is invalid
14ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer in with: 13ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "588032b9-e81f-43da-bdae-e6bcce72a94d",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "0e053737-670e-4e47-8222-8f586a245b0f"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in

                "message": "Amount must be a positive number"

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 425ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
76ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 217.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        217.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 35ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "520134fc-fae1-496e-b3d9-3da961fc8605",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "a9779b06-d0e0-4ef9-8d06-e5467e533a42"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b30d596f-11b7-40b5-8f1b-91a249e2c687",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {

          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "a9779b06-d0e0-4ef9-8d06-e5467e533a42"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b30d596f-11b7-40b5-8f1b-91a249e2c687",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        217.625
    After:
        197.125
    Expected decrease:
        20.5

        197.125

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 182.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        182.125

Info

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 36ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "2ae9542b-b11d-4e89-8400-8b05fa5f9eed",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "3ad5dc0c-0d3c-4150-9bc5-537433e96e78"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b9234a87-be93-4606-9eab-7985887ab729",
              "amount": -182,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "2ae9542b-b11d-4e89-8400-8b05fa5f9eed",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "3ad5dc0c-0d3c-4150-9bc5-537433e96e78"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "b9234a87-be93-4606-9eab-7985887ab729",
              "amount": -182,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        182.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [

          ]
        }
    Response:

          "body": {

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:

        182.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 10ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "7f509807-40fc-4945-949b-d7282814b580",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "00d05d26-55a2-4bc1-8c78-c15e8be77728"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "7f509807-40fc-4945-949b-d7282814b580",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "00d05d26-55a2-4bc1-8c78-c15e8be77728"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],

        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 266ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
74ms 9

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 30ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "323d16e6-eebd-472e-a2cc-09ad32c3f870",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "b57004af-7893-45b7-b1bb-615c5fc19e68"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "50de5c6c-b06a-46a0-a9f3-c70426e55897",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer wallet lifecycle 330ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify wallet balance changes and transfer reversal end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in, transfer out, cancel transfer, and idempotent cancel
330ms 21

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 28ms Show Info +

    Payload:

          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125

            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 33ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no_2>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -35
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "aba6682f-4964-4989-84ba-7ccde76c7fc8",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-35",
          "session_id": "918c93e3-d2ae-4a51-9d88-0fd9f0eb349c"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "10e1e7f8-0653-4df7-b671-4b66d5dc46cf",
              "amount": -35,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "aba6682f-4964-4989-84ba-7ccde76c7fc8",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-35",
          "session_id": "918c93e3-d2ae-4a51-9d88-0fd9f0eb349c"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "10e1e7f8-0653-4df7-b671-4b66d5dc46cf",
              "amount": -35,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        10e1e7f8-0653-4df7-b671-4b66d5dc46cf

Info 

Stored:
    amo011_reference_id:
        10e1e7f8-0653-4df7-b671-4b66d5dc46cf

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 35 14ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 65.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        100.125
    After:
        65.125
    Expected decrease:
        35
    Expected:
        65.125

Info

    API:

When APISYS requests cancel transfer with: 27ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no_2>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/cancel-transfer
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "aba6682f-4964-4989-84ba-7ccde76c7fc8"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "68ee3459-3332-4cf6-ab69-3a69461744f5"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/cancel-transfer
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "aba6682f-4964-4989-84ba-7ccde76c7fc8"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "68ee3459-3332-4cf6-ab69-3a69461744f5"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO014 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And I store the response field "reference_id" as "cancel_reference_id" < 1ms Show Info + 
Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        68ee3459-3332-4cf6-ab69-3a69461744f5

Info 

Stored:
    cancel_reference_id:
        68ee3459-3332-4cf6-ab69-3a69461744f5

field value
reference_id <cancel_reference_id>

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged 16ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check (unchanged):
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        100.125
    After:
        100.125
    Expected:
        100.125
